---
title: "About"
---

I am a tectonic geomorphologist from Santiago, Chile. I study how tectonics, climate, erosion, and sediment transport shape landscapes across timescales.

My work combines field geology, remote sensing, geochronology, thermochronology, and numerical modeling.

I also care deeply about inclusive geoscience, teaching, mentoring, outreach, and science communication—including lessons learned through improvisational theater.

*More biography and a portrait will be added soon.*
